title: Schedule repeating, automatic export of account data
excerpt: The data my team keeps in Monday is absolutely vital to our workflow, so once a week I make sure to export our account’s data manually and keep the copy on my computer just in case. This has come in handy once or twice w…

posts.author: tessap (Tessa Paige)
posts.cookedHtml:
The data my team keeps in Monday is absolutely vital to our workflow, so once a week I make sure to export our account’s data manually and keep the copy on my computer just in case. This has come in handy once or twice when Monday went down and my team was about to grind to a halt.
As we increase the amount of work we do, I’m thinking of doing more than one export a week. It’s feels like a pretty niche thing to request, but in line with Monday’s awesome ability to automate and streamline repetitive tasks— it would be nice if I could tell the account to automatically export a backup every x days!
